scripts.assets:android: npm run assets:prepare && npx cordova-res android --copy
scripts.android:prebuild: npm run prepare:web && npm run assets:android && node ../scripts/clean-cordova-android-icons.js
scripts.android:add: npm run prepare:web && npx cordova platform add android
scripts.android:build: npm run android:prebuild && npx cordova build android
scripts.android:run: npm run android:prebuild && npx cordova run android
